title: LEMON CLOUD Window Film Privacy, Frosted Opaque Glass Films, Non Adhesive Static Cling Heat Control, Tint Decorative Film, for Bathroom Living Room Rental House, Tulip (60x120cm)
features: [Rainbow Effect] Watch as the transparent film creates a stunning rainbow effect when light passes through. Experience an array of changing colors with different light sources. This film can be applied to any smooth glass

[Static Cling Design] This film features a static cling design that is glue-free and reduces chemical release. Simply peel and stick the film in minutes. It adheres securely to the surface and can be easily removed without leaving any residue

[Enhanced Privacy] Our opaque window film blocks unwanted views, ensuring 85% privacy protection. Let natural light illuminate your space while keeping it private. Say goodbye to curtains or blinds with this modern alternative (not recommended for use in bathrooms)

[UV Blocking & Energy Saving] This heat-control privacy window sticker retains warmth during winter and blocks out excessive heat during summer, leading to energy savings. It also blocks 96% of harmful UV rays, protecting your furnishings

[Easy Installation & Maintenance] No need for glue! Simply use soapy water or clear water for installation. Peel off the backing film and follow the detailed instructions in the Product Description below for a hassle-free setup
description: Product Description LEMON CLOUD TULIP FLOWER PRIVACY WINDOW FILM Lemon Cloud window films are perfect for you if you want to bring your house magical changes The beautiful privacy glass stickers are a magic to your eyes. Because of their versatility, you can paste films on your doors and windows to give a brilliant look to all of your rooms, office or store. ENJOY MORE SOFT SUNSHINE & BLOCKING UV RAYS This window privacy film will effectively diffuse direct sunlight to prevent annoying glares and anti 96% of harmful UV. At the same time it will also give you a soft sunshine comfor table experience at your personal space. Previous page Protecting Privacy These frosted opaque obscure covering films are great for privacy and beauty. Leave No Glue Marks The easy-to-apply films can be pasted, removed and reused. It won't leave a mark. Tulip Pattern You can paste this film to home and other room. It will give you a different visual experience. Next page 1 BETTER PRIVACY 2 NO GLUE 3 UNIQUE DECORATION Installation Steps MORE DETAILS ABOUT THIS PRODUCT 3D Beautiful Effect This static self-adhesive window film can be easily removed without any glue residue left. The 3D effect of our window film will be showed on your window under the enough light that can excellent decorate your home. DIY LEMON CLOUD window film is electrostatically applied for easy application and removal. DIY design is available. You can choose your favorite color of Anti UV floral tulip windows film , which will block out the sunrays from damaging your furniture. Why does the static window film peel off？ Make sure to tear off the backing film before pasting on the glass. How can the film stick firmly and scrape all the bubbles？ The static stickers use water to paste. The more water you use, the better. Soapy water can work better. Scrape a few more times with a hard card to ensure all bubbles are disappeared. Why does the privacy film not have any color in the package and looks sheer? Film is transparent itself. Because of its special laser design, the window film won't stay a single performance. And changes its color depending on the intensities of sunshine. The visual experience is rainbow-like only when there is enough light. More suggestions： This glass cling only provide a semi-privacy effect. So we not suggest you use it for the place which need the best privacy effect like a bathroom.
